training_dataset_preprocessing.evidence: Two real PNG files from the exact Preprocessed_Dataset used by all training notebooks were verified as single-channel binary images containing only pixel values 0 and 255, with black ink on a white background. Training notebooks load them using ImageDataGenerator default RGB mode and architecture-specific preprocess_input.
steps: use the complete section crop produced by the frontend without a second contour crop
convert to grayscale and apply non-inverted Otsu binary threshold
replicate the binary image across three RGB channels
resize according to architecture input_shape with nearest-neighbor interpolation
apply Keras application preprocess_input according to architecture
